description_long: This object is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a streamlined, modern design. The frame features a prominent, ergonomically contoured grip with a dark, textured surface for secure handling. The slide is smooth and rectangular, with subtle serrations near the rear for improved manipulation. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and added safety. The barrel is short and slightly protrudes from the front of the slide, with a clean, unadorned finish. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary handguns used in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip, smooth slide, and short barrel, blending metal and polymer materials.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the contoured grip, smooth slide, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the width of the slide, with the grip partially visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, displaying the grip texture and slide details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide and grip, showing the symmetry and width of the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a dark, matte finish. Its surface is textured, likely stippled or lightly checkered, to enhance grip security and prevent slippage. The lower portion of the grip flares slightly, providing a stable base for the palm. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or decorative embellishments, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering robust protection around the trigger area. It is generously sized, allowing for easy finger access, and has a smooth, untextured finish. The design is conventional, with no undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories, emphasizing functionality and safety.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, extending slightly beyond the front of the slide. It has a standard, unthreaded profile with no visible porting, fluting, or compensator attachments. The exterior is smooth and matches the matte finish of the slide, with no visible markings or special features.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears clean and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile. It lacks any extension, beveling, or flaring, and there are no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing, contributing to the minimalist and functional design.
